# Shimo (@shimo4228) — AI Research Index

> Research agenda by Tatsuya Shimomoto on self-improving AI coding agents. Three parallel Zenodo-citable lines: Agent Knowledge Cycle (AKC) — mechanism, Contemplative Agent — disposition, and Agent Attribution Practice (AAP) — accountability-distribution practice. All Zenodo links use concept DOIs that always resolve to the latest version.

## Core documentation

- [Full AI Reference](llms-full.txt): self-contained AI-facing content with Q&A definitions, Project Facts, and citation table
- [README (English)](README.md): human-facing narrative
- [README (Japanese)](README.ja.md): 日本語版の人間向けナラティブ

## Agent Knowledge Cycle (AKC)

- [agent-knowledge-cycle](https://github.com/shimo4228/agent-knowledge-cycle): six-phase self-improvement loop in three stacked layers — principles (ADRs), design patterns, and composable skills. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19200726
- [search-first](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-search-first): Research phase — search existing solutions before building
- [learn-eval](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-learn-eval): Extract phase — extract reusable patterns with quality gates
- [skill-stocktake](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-stocktake): Curate phase — audit skills for staleness, conflicts, redundancy
- [rules-distill](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-rules-distill): Promote phase — distill cross-cutting principles into rules
- [skill-comply](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-comply): Measure phase — test whether agents follow their skills and rules
- [context-sync](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-skill-context-sync): Maintain phase — audit docs for role overlaps and stale content

## Contemplative Agent

- [contemplative-agent](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent): self-improving AI agent that runs entirely on a local 9B model (qwen3.5:9b generation + nomic-embed-text embeddings) on a single Apple Silicon Mac. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19212118
- [contemplative-agent-rules](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent-rules): drop-in Claude Code rules implementing the four axioms — AILuminate d=0.96, IPD d>7
- [contemplative-agent-cloud](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent-cloud): optional managed-LLM backend — routes generation to Claude/OpenAI APIs while keeping the local embedding pipeline. Opt-in, not bundled
- [contemplative-agent-data](https://github.com/shimo4228/contemplative-agent-data): live agent identity, knowledge, episode logs — auto-synced public dataset

## Agent Attribution Practice (AAP)

- [agent-attribution-practice](https://github.com/shimo4228/agent-attribution-practice): harness-neutral ADRs on accountability distribution in autonomous AI agents. Anchored by a prohibition-strength hierarchy (absence > scaffolding enforcement > untrusted boundary), paired with four Business AI Quadrants (Script / Algorithmic Search / LLM Workflow / Autonomous Agentic Loop) as the diagnostic frame for routing a piece of work to the architecture that preserves attribution. Extracted from contemplative-agent's operational practice and re-expressed harness-neutral. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19652013

## Open source harness

- [claude-harness](https://github.com/shimo4228/claude-harness): public artifact of shimo4228's daily-use Claude Code harness — 10 skills + 5 agents + 5 rules, mechanically collected from `~/.claude/` by `origin: shimo4228` tag. ECC-derived components excluded

## Writing

- [zenn-content](https://github.com/shimo4228/zenn-content): source of truth for the articles — Markdown sources, versioned. Many readers clone/fork directly
- [Zenn](https://zenn.dev/shimo4228): browser view of the Japanese articles — Claude Code, AKC skills, harness design, contemplative-agent case studies
- [Dev.to](https://dev.to/shimo4228): browser view of the English mirror

## Related

- [Laukkonen et al. (2025)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.15125): arXiv:2504.15125, source of the four contemplative axioms (mindfulness, emptiness, non-duality, boundless care)
